virtual.noPermissionTip.message: Your account does not have access to virtual simulation experiments. Please contact online support or call 400 610 7808 for authorization.

virtual.publishConfirmTip.message: After publishing, teachers can use the experiment resources in classes. Confirm publish?

virtual.deleteConfirmTip.message: Are you sure you want to delete this course?

virtual.deleteFailTip.message: The experiment resources in {name} are being used by classes and cannot be deleted.

virtual.withdrawConfirmTip.message: After unpublishing, new classes cannot use these resources. Existing classes will not be affected. Confirm unpublish?

virtual.enterNameOrStudentId.message: Search by name or student ID

virtual.scorePatternRule.message: Please enter a score between 0–100 (max 1 decimal place)

virtual.teacherRoleTip.message: You are logged in as a teacher. Please switch to student mode to start the experiment!

virtual.chooseExperimentTimeTip.message: Select a start time to view score details for each attempt.

virtual.photoTypeLimit.message: Photo must be JPEG, JPG or PNG

virtual.tonglabTip.message: Experiment content from Tonglab. Click to auto-load experiment info.

virtual.experimentPublishTip.message: Note: Before publishing, ensure the experiment is integrated per the platform API specification; otherwise, scores cannot be collected.

virtual.deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete it?

virtual.experimentCitedCannotDelete.message: This experiment is in use and cannot be deleted.

textbook.shareTip.message: Scan QR Code or Copy Link to Share

textbook.totalLearnerCountTip.message: This figure includes students from all SPOC sessions (both internal and external to the school) and self-enrolled students. Data is updated daily.

textbook.totalSchoolCountTip.message: The total number of schools that have adopted this course. Data is updated daily.

textbook.courseViewCountTip.message: Sum of course homepage views and total course study sessions. Data is updated daily.

textbook.noTermTip.message: This course is not bound to a specific semester. You may join and study independently.

textbook.noSelfJoinTip.message: Self-enrollment is not available for this course.

textbook.selectClassTip.message: Please select the class you wish to join.

textbook.teacherRoleJoinTip.message: You are currently logged in with a teacher account. Please switch to student mode to join the course.

textbook.sameSchoolJoinTip.message: This course is offered by a teacher at your institution. To avoid issues with grade recording, please join using the class code or QR code provided by your teacher.

textbook.notStudentRoleJoinTip.message: You are not currently logged in with a student account. Please log out and log in with a student account to join the course.

textbook.teacherRoleBuyTip.message: You are currently logged in with a teacher account. Please switch to student mode to make a purchase.

textbook.notStudentRoleBuyTip.message: You are not currently logged in with a student account. Please log out and log in with a student account to make a purchase.

textbook.declarationTips.message: For courses hosted on the U-Campus platform, if you intend to apply for projects such as First-Class Undergraduate Courses​ or Vocational Education Online Quality Courses, the course instructor can manage application details, semesters, and view operational data here.

textbook.enterCourseName.message: Click to enter the courseware name

textbook.originCourseTip.message: The selected courseware portal will serve as the course evaluation portal.

textbook.courseNameLimit.message: Course name must not exceed 200 characters.

textbook.deleteDeclaredCourseConfirm.message: Deleting the application course will not​ delete the associated source courseware or classes, but it will​ delete all configured semester information. Are you sure you want to delete?

textbook.versionTip.message: If a major update is required for the courseware, please duplicate it as a new version in the Courseware Library first. After creating the new version, you must manually associate it with this course. Only then will enrollment data from the new version be counted toward this course.

textbook.termTip.message: If the course is offered across multiple semesters, please create a new class section for each semester. Then, add the semester here and link the corresponding class section. Once configured, you can view the operational data for each session here.

textbook.selfLearnerCountLabel.message: Self-Directed Learners Count (Students who self-enrolled but are not assigned to any semester):

textbook.associateClassTip.message: Please select the corresponding in-class section to associate. Each section can only be linked to one semester.

textbook.questionUnitTip.message: (Only assignments of the "Quiz"​ type contain questions)

textbook.dataUpdateDailyTip.message: * Data is updated daily in the early morning.

textbook.endTimeEarlyError.message: The end time cannot be earlier than the start time

textbook.joinSuccessTip.message: Successfully enrolled! Would you like to enter the course and start learning now?

textbook.selectAtLeastOneVersion.message: Please select at least one version.

textbook.cancelAssociateConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to unlink?

textbook.deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete it?

course.teachingMaterialsTip.message: Teachers can customize the course content according to class teaching arrangement and situation of students. Click: "Add Module", "Add Unit", "Add Activity", you can set your own course structure and content for these 3 layers. Click button(s) following after the unit/activity, you can hide or unhide the unit/activity and add Remarks.

login.organizationLogin.message: Log in to your institutional account

login.smsLoginOnlySupportsMainlandChina.message: *SMS login is only supported for mobile numbers from Mainland China.

login.organizationLoginTip.message: Accounts that are registered and bound with a Student/Staff ID can log in to U-Campus using the Institution Name, Student/Staff ID, and password.

login.loginAgreementPrefix.message: By logging in, you agree to the Ulearning

login.enterStudentIdOrEmployeeId.message: Please enter student ID/ work ID

login.cheatDetectedTip.message: The system has detected misconduct, such as cheating, in the {courses} course(s) associated with this account. The account has been automatically frozen. Please contact your instructor or the platform administrator for assistance.

login.loginFailedTooManyTimes.message: You have tried 5 times and the account is locked. Please retry after 3 minutes.

login.dynamicCodeExpired.message: The dynamic security code has expired

scanSignature.signatureTimeoutSuffix.message: Complete the signature within the time limit. The signature window will close automatically if not completed on time.

scanSignature.scanQrCodeTip.message:
Please scan the QR code to sign.
(Scanning again will overwrite the previous signature.)
